ResearchProjectDef.label: basic galactic arms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Reverse-engineer compact energy weapons and field armor from salvaged galactic technology.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->studied a cracked holdout blaster found in a wreck
subject_story->rebuilt a pulse emitter from scrap capacitors

ResearchProjectDef.label: rim agriculture
ResearchProjectDef.description: Adapt native rim crops to colony hydroponics and dune-field plots. Unlocks biome-specific staple plants.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->catalogued sunbulb tubers from a moisture farm wreck
subject_story->grafted shard cactus onto hydroponic trays
